chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5467 of 2017 CP D 6042 of 2016 CP D 3662 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.22718/20217. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Ms. Lubna Pervez, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Jazib Aftab Memon, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Abdul Manan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Wajahat Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Haider Naqi, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petition has become infructuous and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
